---
name: Protocol Contribution / System Logic
about: Propose a functional improvement to the Sovereign Node.
title: "[PROTOCOL]: "
---

### 1. Logical Alignment
Which protocol does this contribution refine? (e.g., biological.md, logical.md)

### 2. Functional Value
Explain how this contribution increases system efficiency or reduces entropy. 

### 3. The Prime Directive Check
How does this contribution improve the vessel's integrity or the system's logical defense? 

---
*Note: Any submission that does not provide objective, engineering-grade justification will be flagged as noise and closed immediately.*
